data.body: AC amendment: Clarify reviewer-findings.json provenance. Only the deep-tier dso:code-reviewer-* agent in Step 4 may write reviewer-findings.json. Pattern-extraction output from Step 2 must be stored separately (e.g., ARTIFACTS_DIR/huge-pattern-extraction.json) to avoid collision. REVIEWER_HASH in Step 5 comes from the deep-tier synthesis agent output, not from haiku pattern agents. AC: verify workflow distinguishes pattern-extraction storage from reviewer-findings.json.
